message:
Add database family snapshot infrastructure, quarantine support, and external JSONL safety model

Promote tempfile from dev-dependency to runtime dependency to support
read-only database snapshot operations that avoid holding locks on live
databases during inspection commands.

Config infrastructure changes:
- Add with_database_family_snapshot() for lock-free read-only DB access
  by copying the database family (main + WAL/SHM/journal) to a temp dir
  before reading, preventing sidecar pollution on the live database
- Add copy_database_family_to_directory() with symlink and non-regular
  file rejection for snapshot safety
- Add quarantine_database_artifacts() to move anomalous sidecar files
  into timestamped recovery directories for post-mortem analysis
- Make recovery_dir_for_db_path() and first_prefix_from_jsonl() pub(crate)
  so doctor and other commands can reuse them

External JSONL safety model:
- Replace resolved_jsonl_path_is_external() usage with the new
  implicit_external_jsonl_allowed() which only trusts external JSONL
  when the database itself also lives outside .beads/ and the JSONL is
  its sibling, preventing ambient BEADS_JSONL overrides from bypassing
  external-path safety
- Thread allow_external_jsonl through auto_import_if_stale() and
  auto_flush() in main.rs instead of recomputing it per call site

DB override resolution:
- Fix discover_beads_dir_with_cli_from to distinguish CLI --db overrides
  that point inside vs outside .beads/, falling back to workspace
  discovery for external paths instead of using beads_dir_from_db_path
- Add resolve_db_override_from_layer() to anchor relative DB paths to
  the beads cache directory instead of treating them as absolute
- Fix load_startup_config_with_paths() to resolve DB overrides per-layer
  before merging, preventing merged layer ambiguity

Other config changes:
- Fix is_excluded_jsonl() to extract basename before checking the
  exclusion set, so paths like "./deletions.jsonl" are correctly excluded
- Add configured_issue_prefix_from_map() for unified prefix resolution
  across issue_prefix/issue-prefix/prefix key aliases
- Add import_config_for_resolved_jsonl() db_path parameter for accurate
  external JSONL permission computation
- Store allow_external_jsonl on OpenStorageResult for downstream reuse

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -99,6 +99,7 @@ dunce = "1.0.5"
 once_cell = "1.21"
 regex = "1.12"
 shell-words = "1.1.1"
+tempfile = "3.25"
 unicode-width = "0.2.2"
 
 # Versioning
@@ -111,7 +112,6 @@ self_update = { version = "0.42", features = ["rustls", "archive-tar", "compress
 vergen-gix = { version = "9.1", features = ["build", "cargo", "rustc"] }
 
 [dev-dependencies]
-tempfile = "3.25"
 assert_cmd = "2.1"
 predicates = "3.1.4"
 criterion = { version = "0.8.2", features = ["html_reports"] }
